iterations.notes: First production version. Covers scope selection (workspace vs file-level vs user-level), applyTo glob patterns, imperative-rule contract, concise vs extended depth choice, and contradiction detection. Three eval scenarios: TypeScript rules, vague-rule guard, contradiction repair.
known_gaps: No example for user-level cross-workspace instructions
AGENTS.md format not demonstrated (only copilot-instructions.md and .instructions.md)
No example showing how to scope instructions to a sub-folder pattern
improvements_needed: Add an AGENTS.md example alongside the existing .instructions.md example
Add a fourth eval scenario: conflicting rules from two different instruction files
